pos_run_epa_z.what: EPA on runs through this lineman's position-specific gaps
pos_run_epa_z.how: Tackles → end-gap runs (outside zone, sweeps). Guards → guard + tackle gap runs (interior). Center → middle + guard-gap runs from both sides.
pos_run_epa_z.limits: Team-level — RB and play-calling contribute. But position-specific gaps isolate the tackle's outside blocking from the guard's interior blocking.

pos_run_success_z.what: Success rate on position-specific gap runs
pos_run_success_z.how: % of position-attributed runs gaining positive EPA.
pos_run_success_z.limits: Same team-level caveats. 70% of runs have gap data.

pos_run_explosive_z.what: Rate of 10+ yard runs through position-specific gaps
pos_run_explosive_z.how: % of position-attributed runs gaining 10+ yards. Captures big-play creation.
pos_run_explosive_z.limits: Requires both blocking and RB quality. Tackles naturally see more explosives on outside runs.

team_sack_rate_z.what: Team sack rate — fewer sacks = better

team_pressure_rate_z.what: Team pressure rate — less pressure = better

penalty_epa_per_game_z.what: Penalty EPA cost per game — less damage = better
penalty_epa_per_game_z.how: EPA on penalty plays / games. Inverted.

snap_share_z.what: Share of team's max OL snaps played
snap_share_z.how: Player snaps / highest OL snap count on team.
